pages.text: Straight up a branch of the World Tree. The tree that connects worlds together. That the norses believed in.$(br)Pretty strong, huh. But is it strong enough?$(br2)$(3)$(l)Special:$() Shoots magic which may give Levitation for 10 seconds used.
Combine Thorn of Oglogoth and a Cueball in a Totem Lathe.
